meaning: n.牛奶场,奶品场,售牛奶,奶油,鸡蛋等的商店,奶制品
examples: He kept a few dairy cows.
He avoids all meat and dairy products.
Religious Jews buy only kosher-certified products and they separate their meat and dairy foods.
They make knit fabrics, exhaust manifolds, cable anchors and milk coolers for dairy farms, respectively.
